TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ru ja qas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 247 buwan, 588 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 362 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 226 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 56%, Amis 3%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Ru ja qas hya' ga Qu chn.la love vn. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ru ja qas ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ru ja qas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ru ja qas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ru ja qas~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ru ja qas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 247 buwan, 588 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 362 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 226 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 56%, Amis 3%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Ru ja qas hya' ga Qu chn.la love vn. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ru ja qas ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ru ja qas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ru ja qas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa qu ʦ~ʨħn.la lo*e *n. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ru ja qas~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
